verse_text: since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and of your love for all the saints;

links.context: Remembering and without ceasing describe effective prayer (see 2:13; 5:16-18). Faith, hope, and love are three Christian virtues Paul links together in other letters ([[1CO.13:13]]; [[COL.1:4]], [[COL.1:5]]). These virtues are connected to actions: faith works, love labors, hope produces patience, showing that salvation goes beyond attitudes to action.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
